particulars.description: By way of first legal mortgage, all estates or interests in any freehold, leasehold or commonhold property now owned by it;. All present and future estates or interests of the borrower in, or over, any freehold, leasehold or commonhold property;. All its present and future goodwill;. All its uncalled capital; and. All the intellectual property.

persons_entitled.name: Dcd Trustees Limited, the Trustees of the Haak Investments Pension Scheme (Being at the Date Hereof) Eberechi Ajuru Weli and Oluseyi Modupe Weli
